rationale: Gov't Code §418.004 defines terms for the emergency management chapter. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemptions, so no conflict arises.
quote: "Disaster" means the occurrence or imminent threat of widespread or severe damage, injury, or loss of life or property resulting from any natural or man-made cause
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no overlap in subject matter.
